description_long: This object is a large, round wok with a smooth, metallic brown finish and a matching lid featuring a central cylindrical knob. The wok's body is hemispherical, supported by a vertical metallic leg at the front and two rectangular wooden handles extending horizontally from opposite sides. The handles are dark brown, contrasting with the lighter metallic body, and appear robust enough for easy gripping. The lid fits snugly over the wok, with the knob providing a convenient grip for lifting. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a sturdy appearance, suitable for both cooking and serving in an urban outdoor or indoor setting.
description: A large, round metallic brown wok with a matching lid, central knob, and two dark wooden side handles, supported by a vertical leg.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round wok with its lid, central knob, and both wooden handles extending horizontally, as well as the supporting vertical leg.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one wooden handle and the central knob on the lid, with the vertical leg visible beneath the wok.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the wok with both handles and the supporting leg.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the other wooden handle and the central knob on the lid visible.
